overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following an eagle flying through a mountainous river canyon. The bird soars over clear water between rocky cliffs and dense pine forests, transitioning from low-altitude canyon flight to high-altitude valley views before descending through a narrow gorge with waterfalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested river canyon with rocky banks

agents.ego_description: eagle flying low over the river surface, navigating between canyon walls and trees

entered.detail: clear flowing river with visible rocks beneath surface
dense pine trees lining the canyon banks
tall rocky canyon walls with layered sedimentary rock
large rocks protruding from the river current

segments.scene_description: The eagle glides low over a clear mountain river flowing through a narrow canyon. Dense pine forests line both banks while rocky cliffs rise in the distance. The water flows around large boulders, creating small rapids as the bird maintains a steady flight path through the enclosed valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: opening canyon valley with distant mountain views

events.description: eagle begins ascending and gaining altitude as the canyon opens up

agents.ego_description: eagle climbing higher to survey the widening valley and distant mountain range

entered.detail: snow-capped distant mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: As the canyon widens, the eagle gains altitude, revealing a panoramic view of the valley ahead. The distant mountain range becomes visible on the horizon while the river below winds through sparser vegetation. The rocky cliffs recede to the mid-ground as the bird climbs into open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive river valley with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: eagle soaring high over the wide valley, following the river's winding path

segments.scene_description: The eagle soars at high altitude over the expansive valley, with the river snaking through the terrain far below. The distant mountains shift to the left of the frame while scattered boulders dot the riverbanks. The landscape opens into a wide basin with sparse tree coverage and exposed rocky terrain.

events.description: entering narrow canyon section with visible waterfall and rapids

agents.ego_description: eagle descending through the narrow gorge, navigating toward the rushing waterfall

entered.detail: cascading waterfall creating white water rapids in the narrow canyon

segments.scene_description: The eagle descends into a narrow canyon gorge where the river becomes turbulent. A waterfall appears in the distance, creating white water rapids as the canyon walls close in on both sides. The dense forest returns to the near ground while the open valley and distant mountains disappear behind the enclosing cliffs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a low-altitude glide through a confined canyon into a sweeping, high-altitude panoramic view of a mountain valley. It begins with the eagle skimming low over a clear mountain river, weaving through a narrow corridor of dense pine forests and rocky cliffs. As the bird maintains its steady path over boulders and small rapids, the canyon walls gradually widen, allowing the camera to lift away from the water's surface. The scene then expands as the eagle gains altitude, causing the rocky cliffs to recede into the mid-ground while the river below transforms into a winding thread through sparser vegetation. Finally, the perspective opens completely to reveal a vast horizon dominated by a distant, towering mountain range under an open sky.

The shot follows a continuous aerial descent from an expansive, high-altitude valley into the claustrophobic depths of a narrow canyon gorge. It begins with the eagle soaring over a wide basin where a river snakes through the terrain far below and distant mountains shift to the left of the frame. As the camera descends, the open landscape and far-off peaks gradually disappear behind enclosing cliffs, while the sparse tree coverage gives way to a dense forest returning to the near ground. The scene then shifts into a turbulent river corridor where the canyon walls close in on both sides, finally approaching a distant waterfall that churns the water into white rapids.
